text: I feel so angry when my faith feels weak and I keep making the same mistakes
I am furious at myself for drifting away from Allah
I feel so angry going through these hardships and trials in life
This situation is so unfair, I am angry about everything falling apart
I feel angry and hurt because of how people treated me
Someone betrayed my trust and I feel so angry
I am scared that my iman is getting weaker and I might stray
I fear that Allah is not pleased with me because of my sins
I am so afraid of failing these trials and hardships in my life
The hardships I face make me scared about what comes next
I am afraid of being hurt again by people I trusted
People around me make me anxious and I fear being alone
I feel so grateful and happy because my faith has grown stronger
My heart is full of joy knowing Allah is always with me
I feel happy and relieved that my hardships are finally over
After all the struggles I feel joy and peace in my heart
I feel blessed and happy because of the good people around me
My relationships bring me so much joy and gratitude
I feel so sad and lost in my faith, I feel disconnected from Allah
My heart is heavy and I feel sad about my spiritual state
I am so sad going through all these hardships and I feel hopeless
Life has been so hard lately and I feel deeply sad
I feel heartbroken because someone I loved hurt me deeply
I am so sad because my relationships keep falling apart
